items.title: Caterpillar Inc. Maintains Dividend
items.author: Prnewswire
items.description: Caterpillar Inc. has maintained its quarterly dividend of $1.41 per share, payable on February 20, 2025, to shareholders of record as of January 21, 2025. The company has paid a cash dividend every year since its formation and has increased its annual dividend for 31 consecutive years.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company has maintained its quarterly dividend, which is a positive sign for investors. Additionally, the company has a long history of paying and increasing its dividends, which is a strong indicator of financial stability and shareholder value.
